komplyte.name: Komplyte
komplyte.returnPolicy:
- Returns accepted within 7 days.
- Must be unused.
komplyte.greeting:
Hii! 💕 Welcome to Komplyte D2C Support. Main Priya baat kar rahi hoon. Kaise help kar sakti hoon aapki? 😊

1️⃣ Order status check karein 📦
2️⃣ Returns and Refunds policy 🔄
3️⃣ Product features and details 👗
4️⃣ Human support agent se baat karein 👩‍💼
komplyte.escalationMessage: Aapki request log kar di gayi hai. Komplyte support agent aapse 2 minutes mein connect karega. 🙏

demo.name: Riya's Boutique
demo.returnPolicy:
- Returns accepted within 7 days.
- Must be unused.

products.name: Varanasi Silk Saree
products.description: Exquisite handwoven Banarasi pure silk saree featuring heritage floral bootis in real gold zari work.

products.name: Floral Organza Saree
products.description: Delicate pastel organza saree featuring hand-painted botanical designs and fine gota patti borders.

products.name: Royal Velvet Anarkali
products.description: Regal deep emerald velvet Anarkali suit set decorated with hand-embroidered tilla work on neck and sleeves.

products.name: Ivory Chikankari Kurta
products.description: Classic Lucknowi hand-embroidered georgette kurta set in a pristine ivory white tone with slip.

products.name: Crimson Silk Lehenga Set
products.description: Heirloom crimson red silk lehenga skirt featuring floral motifs, matching choli, and sheer organza dupatta.

products.name: Peach Georgette Sharara Set
products.description: Flowy layered pastel peach sharara pants paired with a short sequined kurta and matching dupatta.

products.name: Indigo Blockprint Kurti
products.description: Daily-wear A-line hand block printed cotton kurti dyed in organic indigo shades.

products.name: Hand-embroidered Kaftan
products.description: Silk crepe luxury kaftan printed with traditional Rajasthani architecture motifs, hand-beaded neckline.

products.name: Banarasi Brocade Kurta
products.description: Rich magenta silk brocade straight kurta paired with gold woven tissue palazzo pants.

products.name: Pastel Mint Gharara
products.description: Elegant festive mint green gharara set printed with silver foil details and pink border accents.

products.name: Satin Slip Dress
products.description: Fluid cowl neck satin midi slip dress in luxury emerald green, featuring delicate spaghetti straps.

products.name: Linen Wrap Sun Dress
products.description: Breathable pure organic linen wrap dress featuring a tie belt waist and vintage flared skirt.

products.name: Tweed Double Blazer
products.description: Textured tweed blazer jacket with structured padded shoulders and polished gold-crest buttons.

products.name: Silk Georgette Blouse
products.description: Elegant semi-sheer high-neck silk blouse featuring ruffled neck detail and mother-of-pearl buttons.

products.name: Pleated Satin Skirt
products.description: High-waist champagne gold accordion-pleated midi skirt with a comfortable elasticated waistband.

products.name: Sateen Wide Leg Trousers
products.description: Sleek flowing sateen wide-leg trousers in classic cream white, with front pockets and zip fly.

products.name: Lace Trim Cami Top
products.description: Premium silk cami top detailed with delicate black eyelash lace trimming on the neckline.

products.name: Ribbed Knit Bodycon Dress
products.description: Sophisticated long sleeve ribbed knit midi dress contouring the body, styled with a high collar.

products.name: Floral Chiffon Wrap Dress
products.description: Flowing floral printed chiffon midi wrap dress styled with sheer balloon sleeves and ruffle hem.

products.name: Classic Trench Coat
products.description: Double-breasted water-resistant beige trench coat with storm flaps and a detachable waist belt.

products.name: Leather Satchel Bag
products.description: Structured top-handle genuine leather satchel bag with luxury polished gold-tone locking hardware.

products.name: Suede Crossbody Bag
products.description: Minimalist premium soft suede sling crossbody bag detailed with an adjustable leather shoulder strap.

products.name: Silk Brocade Box Clutch
products.description: Elegant traditional box clutch wrapped in heritage Banarasi silk brocade, finished with a metallic clasp.

products.name: Quilted Chain Tote Bag
products.description: Quilted luxury faux leather shoulder bag styled with interlocked gold chain-link straps and double pocket.

products.name: Canvas Utility Tote
products.description: Spacious woven structured canvas tote bag with contrast leather handles and magnetic button closure.

products.name: Luxury Envelope Clutch
products.description: Sleek envelope foldover clutch in pebble-grained calfskin leather, features card slots and chain strap.

products.name: Saddle Crossbody Bag
products.description: Heritage saddle bag in rich cognac leather, featuring brass buckles and front slip pockets.

products.name: Woven Straw Beach Bag
products.description: Bohemian summer straw shoulder bag woven with geometric panels, perfect for summer outings.

products.name: Designer Bucket Bag
products.description: Mini drawstring leather bucket bag with top carry handle and gold hardware eyelets.

products.name: Metallic Evening Pouch
products.description: Glittering rose gold metallic woven mesh pouch with drawcord lock, perfect for weddings.

products.name: Zardozi Leather Juttis
products.description: Handcrafted leather juttis detailed with traditional gold zardozi leaf embroidery and pearls.

products.name: Ankle Strap Leather Heels
products.description: Classic pointed toe high-heeled pumps detailed with adjustable cross-ankle straps in nude patent leather.

products.name: Satin Mule Flats
products.description: Sophisticated pointed-toe flat slide mules featuring a crystal-embellished decorative front buckle.

products.name: Strappy Suede Sandals
products.description: Lace-up block-heeled sandals crafted in soft black suede leather with tassels.

products.name: Embellished Wedding Heels
products.description: Elegant bridal kitten heels wrapped in champagne satin and hand-beaded with premium glass beads.

products.name: Braided Leather Slides
products.description: Comfortable chic slides with a padded footbed and woven strap detail in tan leather.

products.name: Gilded Kohlapuri Wedges
products.description: Traditional Kohlapuri sandal styled with a modern comfortable cork wedge heel and gold straps.

products.name: Velvet Embroidered Loafers
products.description: Chic smoking slippers in black velvet, embroidered with customized gold monogram details.

products.name: Metallic Strappy Flats
products.description: Minimalist slip-on flat sandals featuring slim intersecting gold straps and square toe.

products.name: Leather Chelsea Boots
products.description: Classic black leather Chelsea boots featuring elasticated panels and low block heel.

products.name: Polki Kundan Necklace Set
products.description: Stunning heritage Choker necklace set in gold-plating, inlaid with uncut glass Polki and hanging green emerald beads.

products.name: Pave Crystal Hoop Earrings
products.description: Sparkling pave-set crystal hoop earrings cast in a modern high-polish rose gold plating.

products.name: Oversized Acetate Sunglasses
products.description: Statement designer square-frame black sunglasses with premium scratch-resistant UV400 lenses.

products.name: Pearl Drop Earrings
products.description: Classic freshwater baroque pearl drops suspended from elegant sterling silver gold-plated studs.

products.name: Silk Hair Scarf Set
products.description: Three pack of organic mulberry silk square neck scarves printed in vintage chic patterns.

products.name: Filigree Cuff Bangle
products.description: Handcrafted adjustable brass cuff bangle detailed with traditional Indian filigree design.

products.name: Classic Rose Gold Watch
products.description: Chic women's timepiece featuring a minimal rose gold dial case and premium mesh strap.

products.name: Emerald Ring 18k Gold
products.description: Dainty 18k solid yellow gold ring set with a faceted natural oval-cut green emerald gemstone.

products.name: Wool Felt Fedora Hat
products.description: Classic autumn fedora hat styled with a structured wide brim and contrast grosgrain band.

products.name: Delicate Coin Anklet
products.description: Minimalist rose gold double chain anklet detailed with tiny polished geometric metal coin drops.

demo.greeting: Namaste! Welcome to Riya's Boutique. How can we help you today?
demo.escalationMessage: We are connecting you to a senior support agent shortly.
